# Enes Koksal

> Full-stack software engineer building scalable applications with .NET and TypeScript.

Enes Koksal is a software engineer based in Türkiye. He builds sustainable, high-performance, and scalable systems end-to-end — from database schemas to pixel-perfect interfaces — approaching each project with a product owner's mindset.

## Current Positions

- Software Engineer at Octopus Signage (Apr 2026 – Present): Developing a high-performance CMS control panel with Next.js to manage thousands of dynamic digital displays.
- Founder at Enes Koksal (May 2025 – Present): Designing and delivering end-to-end web applications for 5+ enterprise clients using .NET, Nest.js, and Next.js.

## Previous Experience

- Software Engineer at Freelancer (Jul 2024 – May 2025): Custom software solutions for 15+ clients, 100% satisfaction rate.
- Intern Data Scientist at TOFAŞ (Jul 2023 – Jul 2024): Predictive ML model for robot fault detection; 3 LLM-based automation bots; 5+ dashboards (QlikSense, Grafana, PowerBI).

## Education

- Mechatronics Engineering, Bursa Technical University (2020 – 2024)

## Core Skills

- Languages & Runtimes: C#, TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js
- Backend: .NET, ASP.NET Core, Nest.js
- Frontend: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn, Zustand, Redux Toolkit, React Query
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MSSQL, MongoDB, Redis
- Messaging: RabbitMQ, WebSockets
- Architecture: Clean Architecture, Event-Driven, Microservices, Hexagonal Architecture, REST APIs
- Testing: xUnit, Moq, FluentAssertions, Jest, Vitest, RTL, Cypress, Playwright, Testcontainers
- DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions
- Tools: Postman, Swagger, Sentry, SonarQube, Figma

## Languages

- Turkish: Native
- English: B1
